summary: Add docstrings to all Python files
agent_instructions: Review every .py file in the project. Add Google-style docstrings to all functions and classes that are missing them. Each docstring should describe what the function does, its parameters, and its return value.
constraints: Do not change any logic or behavior. Only add docstrings.

summary: Create unit tests for utils module
agent_instructions: Write pytest unit tests for every public function in src/utils.py. Cover normal cases, edge cases, and error cases. Place tests in tests/test_utils.py.
constraints: Use pytest only. Do not use unittest or mock unless absolutely necessary.
